assertions.title: Link pills use surface2 background, rounded20, body2 text 17px, neutral2 color

steps.action: Open http://localhost:3102, scroll to About section, and inspect computed styles on external link pills (Website/Explorer)
steps.expected: background rgb(31, 31, 31), border-radius 20px, font-size 17px, color rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65)
steps.observed: Website and Explorer pills had background rgb(31, 31, 31) and border-radius 20px, but computed font-size was 16px and color was rgb(255, 255, 255).

evidence.network: Observed frontend fetches to GET http://localhost:3100/depth, GET /candles?interval=1h and 5m, and repeated GET /market during this run.

assertions.issues: Typography/color mismatch persists on link pills: expected 17px neutral2 text, observed 16px white text.

assertions.title: Main CTA button uses 17px text, medium weight, rounded20, min-height 56px

steps.action: Inspect computed styles of the main swap CTA (`Connect Wallet`) on http://localhost:3102
steps.observed: CTA had border-radius 20px and min-height 56px, but computed font-size was 16px and font-weight was 400.

evidence.network: Observed frontend fetches to GET http://localhost:3100/depth, GET /candles?interval=1h and 5m, and repeated GET /market during this run.

assertions.issues: CTA typography mismatch persists: expected 17px/500, observed 16px/400.

frictions.description: The tested token page exposed Website and Explorer pills but no Twitter pill, so style checks were performed on the visible external pills.
frictions.resolution: Validated all available external link pills in the About section (Website, Explorer).

summary: Retested 2 assertions (ABOUT-004, SWAP-005): both failed. Background/radius requirements matched, but required 17px/neutral2 and 17px/medium typography values were still not met in the production surface.
